stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 696 Figure 2.5.
What is the safe CG range for a single-engined piston aeroplane with a cruise mass of 2 600 lb?

options.a: Forward limit: 74.0 in; aft limit: 87.7 in
options.b: Forward limit: 71.4 in; aft limit: 88.4 in
options.c: Forward limit: 77.1 in; aft limit: 87.7 in
options.d: Forward limit: 79.0 in; aft limit: 87.7 in
